data.title: Advanced Encryption Standards
data.description: Encryption protocols that ensure data confidentiality and integrity for user communications and transactions.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AES-256 encryption for sensitive data alongside HTTPS for secure web communication.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Enhances security by requiring two or more verification factors to access an account.
data.technical_spec: Provides MFA options, such as SMS codes or authenticator apps, for user accounts.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Continuous security assessments to identify vulnerabilities and implement defenses.
data.technical_spec: Conducts internal and third-party security audits to check for potential security gaps.

data.title: Firewall Protection
data.description: Utilizes firewalls to protect network resources from unauthorized access and threats.
data.technical_spec: Employs both software and hardware firewalls as part of a comprehensive network security strategy.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Prevents Distributed Denial of Service attacks that can disrupt website accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Uses advanced DDoS protection measures from cloud services or in-house solutions to absorb traffic spikes.
